title: Episode 1
overview: Abstract painter Atiye crosses paths with Erhan, an archaeologist who discovered a mysterious symbol at the Göbeklitepe excavation site.

title: Episode 2
overview: A haunting vision torments Atiye amid wedding preparations. Erhan retrieves a clue leading to the woman who keeps appearing before Atiye.

title: Episode 3
overview: As Zühre's identity comes to light, Atiye suspects a deliberate cover-up. Erhan hears about a blind woman who had visited his father at Göbeklitepe.

title: Episode 4
overview: Serdar scrambles to find Atiye, Erhan sees a vision of his family, and Zühre reveals to Atiye her calling -- and their shared mystical lineage.

title: Episode 5
overview: Inside the cave, Atiye comes to terms with her past and faces her fears. Erhan rushes to find the tunnel entrance as Atiye's fate hangs by a thread.

title: Episode 6
overview: A picture of Shahmaran confirms Erhan's suspicions. Atiye stumbles upon a shocking truth while investigating the Kurtiz family deaths.

title: Episode 7
overview: Bristling under pressure from Serdar, Ozan confronts Cansu about her attempts to confess to Atiye. A betrayal threatens to seal Atiye's fate.

title: Episode 8
overview: In a flashback, Zühre shares with Nazım her premonitions about Atiye and Erhan. Atiye makes a fateful decision that inevitably alters reality.

title: Episode 1
overview: Thrust into an unsettling new reality in which her existence is void, Atiye encounters a familiar face at the place where it all began.

title: Episode 2
overview: Serdar orders Hannah to keep a close watch on Atiye, who soon discovers Serdar's link to Erhan's mining operation and meets a man from Erhan's past.

title: Episode 3
overview: Atiye shows Nazım's notebook to Erhan and encounters the fertility symbol. Mustafa investigates Serap's past, and Atiye has a shocking realization.

title: Episode 4
overview: As Ozan's fate hangs by a thread, Serdar scrambles to locate Atiye, who learns that she carries the world's only hope for a future.

title: Episode 5
overview: Melek begins to connect the dots, Hannah coerces Nazım into helping her find Erhan and a benevolent figure awaits Erhan and Atiye at Cappadocia.

title: Episode 6
overview: Serap sends Melek a signal. Seher points Atiye to the stone inscriptions that would help Erhan remember her, but Atiye's journey hits a snag.

title: Episode 7
overview: As Elif's time runs out, Serdar reveals his dark, tragic beginnings and forces Atiye to lead him to the cave's entrance.

title: Episode 8
overview: The truth behind the deaths of pregnant women comes to light. Two parallel realities intersect as Atiye fulfills her quest — at a price.

title: Episode 1
overview: Atiye and Erhan continue to search for their daughter. An unsettling vision rattles Atiye, and a mystical symbol resurfaces.

title: Episode 2
overview: Serdar traces Aden's whereabouts, but his pursuit takes a turn. Atiye scrambles to make sense of signs from Aden. Ozan commits a fateful act.

title: Episode 3
overview: Erhan and Atiye stumble upon a mysterious device linked to the Unknown Community. Cansu knocks on Ozan's door and encounters Melek.

title: Episode 4
overview: Umut helps to translate the recording from the black box and sets out for Mardin with Erhan to seek answers. Atiye struggles to connect with Aden.

title: Episode 5
overview: A denbêj sheds light on Umut's special lineage and tragic past. In Mardin, a familiar figure leads Atiye and Aden to an underground cave.

title: Episode 6
overview: Erhan chases a hooded thief who takes off with the maps from the museum. Atiye bonds with Aden and gives her the sap from the Tree of Life in Dara.

title: Episode 7
overview: Aden wrestles with mixed voices in her head as Atiye realizes her daughter's world-altering abilities. Ozan confronts Melek, with dire consequences.

title: Episode 8
overview: Melek reveals her role in Umut's family tragedy. As her apocalyptic vision comes to life, will Atiye have to sacrifice what she cherishes most?
